creative_modes.name: Mission Control
creative_modes.description: Students complete sections to stabilize a failing space mission.

creative_modes.name: Vault Run
creative_modes.description: Each completed section unlocks one layer of a digital vault.

creative_modes.name: Survival Mode
creative_modes.description: Students protect their streak of lives through adaptive question waves.

creative_modes.name: Coach Mode
creative_modes.description: Friendly coach avatar gives pacing nudges during simulation.

nudges: Breathe and move on if stuck.
